leadText: Hulbury (Japanese: バウタウン Bow Town) is a small town located in central Galar. It is home to the Galar region's Water-type Gym, Hulbury Stadium. To the west is Route 5 and to the east is Galar Mine No. 2.

sections.title: Slogan
sections.text: Slogan [ edit | edit source ] A bustling seaport that many visit to see its lively market stalls and famed restaurant. (Japanese: 市場 や レストランに 多 くの 人 が 集 まる 港町 A port town where many people gather at its market and restaurant. )

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Hulbury Stadium 1.2 Hulbury Station 1.2.1 Poké Mart 1.3 Pokémon Center 1.3.1 Poké Mart 1.4 Herb Shop 1.5 Incense Merchant 1.6 The Captain's Table Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Hulbury Stadium [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Hulbury Stadium Hulbury Stadium is the second Gym in Galar and specializes in Water types. Its Leader is Nessa , who hands out the Water Badge to the Gym Challengers who defeat her. Hulbury Station [ edit | edit source ] This section is incomplete. Please feel free to edit this section to add missing information and complete it. Reason: Specific trigger for the tracks becoming unblocked Hulbury Station is located in the northwest of town. The player can catch a train from this station to the following locations: Wedgehurst Station Wild Area Station ( Wild Area ) Motostoke Station Hammerlocke Station (once the player has spoken to Hop outside the Hammerlocke Station) White Hill Station (once the player has visited Route 10) Wyndon Station (once the player has visited Wyndon) Armor Station (once the player has visited Armor Station from Wedgehurst Station) Crown Tundra Station (once the player has visited Crown Tundra Station from Wedgehurst Station) Poké Mart [ edit | edit source ] This Poké Mart is located inside Hulbury Station. Left clerk Poké Ball $ 200 Great Ball $ 600 Ultra Ball 5 Badges $ 800 Potion $ 200 Super Potion $ 700 Hyper Potion 4 Badges $ 1,500 Max Potion 7 Badge $ 2,500 Full Restore 8 Badges $ 3,000 Antidote $ 200 Burn Heal $ 200 Ice Heal $ 200 Awakening $ 200 Paralyze Heal $ 200 Full Heal 6 Badges $ 400 Revive $ 2,000 Repel 3 Badges $ 400 Super Repel 5 Badges $ 700 Max Repel 7 Badges $ 900 Poké Doll 2 Badges $ 300 Herb Shop [ edit | edit source ] Herb Shop Energy Powder $ 500 Energy Root $ 1,200 Heal Powder $ 300 Revival Herb $ 2,800 Incense Merchant [ edit | edit source ] Incense Shop Rose Incense $ 2,000 Sea Incense $ 2,000 Wave Incense $ 2,000 Rock Incense $ 2,000 Odd Incense $ 2,000 Lax Incense $ 5,000 Full Incense $ 5,000 Pure Incense $ 6,000 Luck Incense $ 11,000 The Captain's Table [ edit | edit source ] Icon of the Captain's Table The Captain's Table is a famous seafood restaurant in Hulbury. Rose often comes here incognito to eat, but word always gets out about his presence regardless. After defeating Nessa, the player meets Rose and Sonia at the restaurant. After becoming Champion, the Cook at the restaurant will request the player to run them a series of food deliveries around Hulbury. The first customer is located in the house next to Hulbury Station, the second one is in the fourth house north of the Pokémon Center, and the third one is at the easternmost stall at the market. Completing all the deliveries earns the player a Lucky Egg .
